name: White & Green Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh green beans (about 3/4 lb), cut on the diagonal into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and inspect the dried beans. Discard any damaged ones.
2. Place beans in a large saucepan or kettle with water to cover by about 2 inches. Bring to a boil, then remove from heat, cover, and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Return to a boil and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes more.
4. Using a heavy fork, mash the garlic with salt until smooth. Add to the saucepan with beans.
5. Add broth, pepper, rosemary, and bring back to a simmer.
6. Continue cooking, partially covered, until beans are tender but not mushy (up to 1 hour).
7. In a separate pot, cook green beans in 2 quarts boiling salted water until bright and crisp-tender, about 4-5 minutes. Drain and stir into the soup when beans are cooked.
8. Stir in butter and lemon juice. Serve immediately while hot.
Note: For a smooth texture, puree before adding green beans if desired.
